text_direction=”default”]

Fill Up On The Flavours Of ARC at Fairmont Waterfront

Book your flights + Bottomless Brunch at ARC Restaurant in the Fairmont Waterfront.

[/vc_column_text][divider line_type=”No Line” custom_height=”40″][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” flex_gap_desktop=”10px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/4″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text css=”” text_direction=”default”]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” flex_gap_desktop=”10px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”3/4″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text css=”” text_direction=”default”]Departing from the downtown Victoria Harbour Heliport on a mid-morning flight, experience the amazing scenic beauty of the Salish Sea, The Gulf and San Juan Islands on the 35 minute flight from Victoria to Vancouver Harbour.

Upon arrival, the Helijet courtesy shuttle can drop guests off at the Fairmont Waterfront, 900 Canada Place Way. Make your way to the bright and modern ARC Restaurant to find your reserved table for Bottomless Brunch!

Wear your stretchy pants and find your fill of the unlimited brunch small plates along with complimentary coffee or tea. Eggs Benedict, Lobster Mac & Cheese, Poutine, Skillets, Fried Chicken, Smoothies, Baked Treats with Honey from the Hotel’s own hives and fresh, local produce and so much more![/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” flex_gap_desktop=”10px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text css=”” text_direction=”default”]

  • Departures at 11:05pm (weekends only) from Victoria Harbour Heliport.
  • Helijet Courtesy Shuttle will drop off at Fairmont Waterfront for your afternoon reservation for Bottomless Brunch.
  • Suggested return flights at 3pm (weekends only) from Vancouver Harbour Heliport.
  • Based on availability, weekends only, other return flight times may be available, if guests would like to stay and explore Vancouver.
    Excursion, as suggested = approximately 4.5 hour duration including 70 minutes flight time. Available Saturdays, Sundays, and Holidays Only

Flight Fare*: (paid at check-in at Helijet)
Helijet UltraSaver Fare; per person one-way including taxes and fees
$333 / 13+
$138 / Child up to 12 years accompanied by an adult

Bottomless Brunch: (paid at Arc Dining at Fairmont Waterfront)
$69.00 per person plus tax (beverages, a la carte items and gratuities are extra)
show your Helijet confirmation to receive 15% off food & beverage

*fares based on Ultra-Saver Fare, subject to change without notice
As space is limited, excursions bookings are suggested at least 48 hours in advance. 
Cancellations may be made up to 24 hours in advance, non-refundable within 24 hours.
Ask for Group Booking fees and cancellations

Email excursions[at]helijet.to.com for more information
Call Helijet Reservations, 1.800.665.4354, to book your Flights + Bottomless Brunch[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” flex_gap_desktop=”10px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” column_position=”default” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/6″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][/vc_column][/vc_row]
